meta.title: Giveaway rules – Meta Quest 3S | ERNI
meta.description: Official rules of the Meta Quest 3S headset giveaway organised by ERNI.

intro: Below you will find the official giveaway rules. They explain the prize, who may enter, and how the prize will be delivered.

blocks.text: The organiser will run a giveaway for a **Meta Quest 3S** headset among entrants who meet the conditions set out in these rules.
You may enter if you meet at least one of the following conditions:

items: You are among the **top 10** on the leaderboard for the **ERNI Bots (CTF)** game.
You are among the **top 10** on the leaderboard for the **Fire or Fired** video game.

blocks.text: The prize will only be shipped to addresses located on the **Iberian Peninsula**.
The draw will take place on **22 April 2026**.
The winner will be selected from among entrants who meet the eligibility requirements.
The organiser will contact the winner by **email** to request a postal address for shipping the prize.
The winner will have **5 calendar days** from the date the email is sent to reply and provide the shipping details.
If there is no response within that period, the organiser reserves the right to **run a new draw** among eligible entrants to select another winner.
Entering the giveaway constitutes **full acceptance** of these rules.
